def top_matches(ratings_queryset, items, item, n=5, similarity=sim_pearson_correlation):
    scores = [
        (similarity(ratings_queryset, item, other), other) for other in items if other != item
    ]
    scores.sort()
    scores.reverse()
    return scores[:n]

def key(self, value):
        oldname = str(self.db_key)
        self.db_key = value
        self.save(update_fields=["db_key"])
        self.at_rename(oldname, value)
        SIGNAL_TYPED_OBJECT_POST_RENAME.send(sender=self, old_key=oldname, new_key=value)
